title: Evangelion episode
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion episode..? Post by ddelanois » Sun Jun 05, 2011 2:30 pm I remember watching some episode where Shinji had some sort of spike coming toward him, and it then consumed him and the eva and turned him into a tree looking cross... what episode was this?

[]: Post by Hawq » Sun Jun 05, 2011 2:36 pm Sounds like you're remembering the film EoE, the spike is the recalled Lance, technically its the film version of ep26 I guess, been a while but pretty sure a card id's it as a 26, last half of the film anyway

[]: Post by ddelanois » Sun Jun 05, 2011 2:47 pm its like something organic, it goes through the chest of the eva and then into him.. i cant find it anywhere

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 05, 2011 2:47 pm The End of Evangelion
